title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 30 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 30/01/2024
Image reference: 2024-01-30_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-30-2024_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values stayed mostly stable across the board
Panamax BC Artemis (76,900 DWT, Sep 2006, Namura) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 13.00 mil, VV Value USD 12.58 mil
Supramax BC Isabella M (56,100 DWT, Jul 2006, Zhoushan) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 12.00 mil, VV Value USD 11.84 mil
Handymax BC Rui Fu Xing (36,700 DWT, Jul 2012, Hyundai Mipo) sold to unknown Turkish buyers for USD 16.50 mil, VV Value USD 16.50 mil
Tankers: Tanker tonnage across all sizes increased last week due to strong sentiment, notably Aframaxs firmed due to the recent deal of Mare Oriens
LR2 Mare Oriens (110,500 DWT, Sep 2008, Mitsui Ichihara) sold to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 42 mil (SS/DD Passed), VV Value USD 42.36 mil
MR1 Paprika (40,100 DWT, Jan 2003, Hyundai Mipo) sold to Undisclosed buyers for USD 15 mil, VV Value USD 14.08
Containers: Another week of positive gains across the board for Container values supported by higher earnings
No notable sales last week
Image reference: 2024-01-30_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-30-2024_img2.jp
